alternatives.name: Ground/turned round bar stock (CNC-machined to rotor geometry)
alternatives.tradeoffs: 50-70% material removal in machining; high machining cost; no geometry advantage for non-round cross-sections; unlimited availability from distributors (ThyssenKrupp, Schmolz+Bickenbach, Ovako) with 1-3 day delivery. Dominant ~60% share.

alternatives.name: Cold-drawn / cold-rolled near-net-shape profiles (ZOLLERN)
alternatives.tradeoffs: IT8 tolerance (+-0.02 mm); in-line IH to 64 HRC with +-1.5 HRC control; Cpk >1.33 on custom cross-sections. Weakness: 6-12 week die lead; ~100 kg min batch; steel-only; single-source die dependency. ~15-25% share.

alternatives.name: Forged steel blanks
alternatives.tradeoffs: Forging tooling EUR 10-50K; min lot sizes larger than profiles; lead time 8-16 weeks; better for 3D geometries; higher unit cost for straight/constant cross-section applications. ~15-25% share.

alternatives.name: Powder metal (sintered) blanks
alternatives.tradeoffs: Self-lubricating porosity for low-speed pumps; good for small rotors. Porosity limits high-pressure use; dimensional tolerance requires post-sinter grinding; ~33% lower contact fatigue; limited to smaller cross-sections. ~5% share.

alternatives.name: Do nothing / continue with existing supplier (status quo)
alternatives.tradeoffs: Zero switching cost, zero qualification burden. Only displaced by cost, quality failure, or supply disruption at incumbent. Most common competitive scenario.
